<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="deploy" id="deploy"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-174" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="CD 阶段：/deploy 六步构建部署 + /prod-testing 三层冒烟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="240" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="构建" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="120" x="60" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Step 1

nginx root 不是 dist 子目录" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="180" x="250" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="重启" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="140" x="480" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Step 5

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 531px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
